parameters.url: ={{ $env.K8S_API_URL }}/apis/batch/v1/namespaces/{{ $('Build K8s Job Manifest').first().json.k8sNamespace }}/jobs/{{ $('Build K8s Job Manifest').first().json.jobName }}
={{ $env.K8S_API_URL }}/api/v1/namespaces/{{ $('Build K8s Job Manifest').first().json.k8sNamespace }}/pods?labelSelector=job-name={{ $('Build K8s Job Manifest').first().json.jobName }}

parameters.content:
## 🤖 Dev Team Orchestrator

Single-workflow implementation of the Architect → Executor → Reviewer → Verify pipeline.

**Discord Commands:**
- `$team <task> in owner/repo` — Single pass
- `$ralph <task> in owner/repo` — Self-healing loop (3 retries)

**Setup:**
1. Replace CREDENTIAL_ID placeholders
2. Set env vars: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OLLAMA_CODE_MODEL
3. Ensure Ollama is running (docker-compose.override.yaml)
4. Add GitHub credentials in n8n
5. Set up K8s: kubectl apply -f k8s/setup.yaml
6. Set K8S_API_URL, K8S_TOKEN, K8S_NAMESPACE env vars
